description: The Maserati MC20, produced from 2020, marks Maserati's return to mid-engined supercars. Its Nettuno 3.0-litre twin-turbo V6 uses a pre-chamber combustion system derived from Formula 1 technology to produce 621 bhp. Available as Coupe and Cielo (convertible), it competes with the Ferrari F8 and McLaren 720S.
